title: Just Enough Recipes (JER)
body:
Adds crafting recipes for items previously only obtainable through looting, fishing, or trading. You can now craft saddles, name tags, horse armor, elytra, and sponges using vanilla ingredients.

![Elytra Craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/740c330032831cb6d6db8c05b2db6939405be3fa.png)
![Name Tag Craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76e23f27ba964ada6e33f9e98a12f0b04a569904.png)
![Saddle Craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/720121b4f8a09cdae66bddba90917f7cf779557f.png)
![Sponge Craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e3a3d3e0b2e556e2763b49dfc0443cda2899551.png)
![Horse Armor Craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/401f86714d7d48a6cbe444d57f77774c9f5c38b8.png)
